default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly all-hands meeting to introduce new hires, provide pipeline updates, and showcase new workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company growth: 7 new hires, now at 50 employees (up from 10 in January)](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Pipeline focus: Stricter qualification criteria leading to higher-quality deals (e.g., Webflow, SentinelOne)](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [New workflows: Style guide generator and article analysis tool introduced to enhance content creation](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Linear & Geekbot usage: Emphasized for improved task tracking and team communication](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [7 new employees introduced, bringing total headcount to 50](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Diverse backgrounds: UK, Colombia, Slovakia, North Carolina, Missouri, India, Pakistan](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Varied interests: horse riding, mountain biking, cat rescue, CrossFit, yoga, football](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Pipeline & Deal Updates

  - [More selective qualification process: focusing on higher domain authority and ICP fit](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Notable deals:](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Webflow: Kickoff last week](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [SentinelOne: Late procurement stage](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [Vappy AI: $27k/month for voice agent technology](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [StackBlitz: $27k/month, \~$330k contract for Bolt.new product](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [CERN and Imobit: Targeting compliance-heavy and technical industries](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Average deal size increasing to $12k-15k+](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### New Workflows Demonstration

  - [Article analysis tool: Extracts company names, key topics, and performs image searches from input text](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Style guide generator:](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [Creates customized style guides based on example articles (up to 10)](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
      - [Outputs sections on tone, voice, with good/bad examples](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
      - [Designed to be further refined manually for client-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Linear & Geekbot Usage

  - [Geekbot: Used for daily stand-ups and team communication](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Linear:](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Project management tool with separate projects for each client](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - Small requests (\<1 week) vs. larger projects (\>1 week)
      - [Integration with Slack for easy task creation](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Test and provide feedback on the new style guide generator workflow](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Utilize the article analysis tool in content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Continue refining Linear usage for project and task management](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Volunteers sought for future all-hands presentations on ongoing work](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Maintain focus on tailoring content style and tone for each client](https://fathom.video/share/PqoYcVGyLy1s1KFKd5yupk1kF3x5yRV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

Build workflows to summarize and send digests of Geekbot updates
Use Linear for tracking work; create tasks from Slack requests
Continue development on image integration and generation workflows
Test new style guide workflow in Aerofs; provide feedback on outputs vs. client style guides
Customize generated style guides manually for client-specific tone and examples
